cover.era_chip: 三國 · 統一 戰爭
cover.subtitle:
살수에서 기벌포까지,
한반도 통일을 만든 전투들.
cover.imagePrompt: Three Kingdoms era Korean illustration, 7th century. Goguryeo soldier (Eulji Mundeok) in dark green leather armor with horned helmet, holding a long spear, standing on a riverbank with the Salsu (Cheongcheon) River behind. Far across the river: silhouettes of Sui dynasty Chinese soldiers retreating. Ancient pine trees, mountains in mist. Color: deep forest green + bronze + ink-black. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 관산성. 백제 성왕 전사, 나제동맹 결렬.
안시성. 88일 포위 끝 당 태종 철수.
기벌포 해전. 신라가 당 축출, 통일 완성.

items.name: 김유신
items.desc: 통일 전쟁 총사령. 매소성 승리 주도.

items.title: 백제 멸망
items.desc: 황산벌 후 사비성 함락, 660 백제 끝.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험은 살수(수)와 안시성(당)의 상대국 구분, 매소성=육전·기벌포=해전 구분, 관산성에서 백제 성왕 전사가 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized ancient Korean spear crossed with a bow, suggesting Three Kingdoms warfare. Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
